title: Holigo
description: A travel super-app for flights, buses, hotels, and more, shipped on the App Store and Play Store. At PT Aplikasi Liburan Indonesia I shipped and maintained cross-platform features for Android and iOS with GetX, spanning booking, partner, and account flows.

contributions.title: Flight module
contributions.text: built multi-city flight booking: form UI states, core booking methods, and flow control, and authored the module's technical documentation (V2 & Multicity).

contributions.title: Bus module
contributions.text: developed the search and booking controller with its data flow, validation, and error handling.

contributions.title: Mitra (partner) module
contributions.text: controller and state management, API integration, KYC verification, and fund-withdrawal logic.

contributions.title: Referral & deep links
contributions.text: share-referral flow, Firebase Dynamic Links handling, and Android Install Referrer integration.
